message:
feat(policy_dsl): add composable rule predicate AST for policy DSL (ft-2h2hp)

Implements a recursive boolean predicate tree (RulePredicate) with And/Or/Not
combinators for policy rule matching, replacing the flat AND/OR-within-categories
model. Includes DslRule evaluation engine with priority/severity/specificity
tie-breaking, PredicateTrace for audit explainability, message template
interpolation, and telemetry counters. 47 unit tests + 36 property tests
(8 serde roundtrip + 28 behavioral invariants including De Morgan's laws,
commutativity, and boolean algebra identities).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
